results.name: graph_analytics_visibility
results.stdout_tail:
row query/materialization, prepared any-hit count, and summary postprocess where the public app can observe them. They are local diagnostics, not public RTX speedup claims.",
  "ray_tracing_accelerated": true,
  "ray_tracing_note": "For Embree, BFS and triangle_count now use ray traversal over graph-edge primitives for candidate generation, and visibility_edges uses ray/triangle any-hit. For OptiX, BFS and triangle_count have an explicit native graph-ray mode behind --optix-graph-mode native, visibility_edges summary mode uses prepared any-hit count to avoid row materialization, and graph summary mode uses native graph continuation after rows are produced. Only visibility_edges is a current RT-core claim until cloud validation promotes the graph-ray path.",
  "rt_core_accelerated": true,
  "scenario": "visibility_edges",
  "sections": {
    "visibility_edges": {
      "app": "graph_visibility_edges",
      "backend": "optix",
      "blocker_count": 1,
      "blocker_pack_mode": "not_applicable",
      "boundary": "Graph visibility_edges maps candidate graph edges to RTDL visibility rays and uses ray/triangle any-hit traversal. It is not BFS, triangle-count, shortest path, or general graph database acceleration.",
      "candidate_edge_count": 4,
      "copies": 1,
      "native_continuation_active": true,
      "native_continuation_backend": "optix_visibility_pair_rows",
      "observer_count": 2,
      "output_mode": "rows",
      "prepared_scene_reused_across_ray_batches": false,
      "primitive_contract": {
        "active_v1_4_backend": true,
        "alternate_summary_primitive": "not_applicable",
        "app_row": "graph_analytics.visibility_edges",
        "backend": "optix",
        "backend_contract_role": "nvidia_rt_target",
        "backend_scope": [
          "embree",
          "optix"
        ],
        "build_layout": "triangle2d_blocker_buffer",
        "claim_boundary": "graph_analytics.visibility_edges only: candidate graph edges lowered to ray/triangle any-hit and optional aggregate count. This excludes BFS, triangle counting, shortest path, graph databases, frontier bookkeeping, and graph reductions.",
        "migration_status": "compatibility_wrapper_metadata_only",
        "mode": "one_shot",
        "phase_counters": [
          "input_construction_sec",
          "blocker_pack_sec",
          "ray_pack_sec",
          "scene_prepare_sec",
          "ray_prepare_sec",
          "query_anyhit_count_sec",
          "query_visibility_pair_rows_sec",
          "summary_postprocess_sec"
        ],
        "prepared_state": "none_required_for_row_materialization",
        "primitive": "ANY_HIT",
        "probe_layout": "visibility_ray2d_probe_buffer",
        "result_layout": "per_edge_visibility_rows",
        "same_contract_baseline_required": true,
        "summary_primitive": "not_applicable"
      },
      "ray_batch_summaries": [],
      "ray_pack_mode": "not_applicable",
      "row_count": 4,
      "rows": [
        {
          "observer_id": 1,
          "target_id": 10,
          "visible": 0
        },
        {
          "observer_id": 1,
          "target_id": 11,
          "visible": 0
        },
        {
          "observer_id": 2,
          "target_id": 10,
          "visible": 0
        },
        {
          "observer_id": 2,
          "target_id": 11,
          "visible": 1
        }
      ],
      "rt_core_accelerated": true,
      "run_phases": {
        "input_construction_sec": 1.9419938325881958e-05,
        "query_visibility_pair_rows_sec": 0.7049595918506384,
        "summary_postprocess_sec": 1.0730698704719543e-05
      },
      "summary": {
        "blocked_edge_count": 3,
        "visible_edge_count": 1
      },
      "target_count": 2,
      "visibility_query_repeats": 1,
      "visibility_ray_batches": 1
    }
  },
  "unifies": [
    "examples/rtdl_graph_bfs.py",
    "examples/rtdl_graph_triangle_count.py"
  ],
  "visibility_query_repeats": 1,
  "visibility_ray_batches": 1
}
